text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to look outside the window<n>and notice
Agnes Digital running in the<n>rain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Here I go! One more laaap!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Thirty minutes later, while I'm<n>walking down the
hallway...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Phew, that was a good run.
choice_data_list: It must've been tough running in the rain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you... Uehehe! Of courseyou'd think that, noob! Little do youknow, I was out there because itwas raining! ♪

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast says it's going<n>to rain
during my race, so I figured I<n>should practice
under the same<n>conditions!
choice_data_list: You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too hard.
You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The weather forecast says it's going<n>to rain
during my race, so I figured I<n>should practice
under the same<n>conditions!
choice_data_list: You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too hard.
You'll catch a cold if you push yourself too hard.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Tsk, tsk! I'm no hothouse flower! ♪<n>No rain,
beat-up tracks, or cold's<n>gonna stop my burning
passion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And come rain or shine, my next race<n>is still on
dirt, so I've got nothing to<n>lose from practicing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Guehehe! I'd sooner die than miss<n>out on the
best moment in a race, no<n>matter what kind of
dirt track I'm<n>running on! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital does have a point.<n>Training in poor
conditions makes it<n>easier to adapt to all kinds of<n>
situations.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But of course! I don't ever wanna cut<n>corners!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her gleaming eyes are full of passion.<n>With such
an unwavering drive to win,<n>she's an exemplary
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much! I strive to<n>capture every
glimpse of lovely<n>perfection with my eyes no
matter<n>how poor the conditions! ♪
choice_data_list: Uh... What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The sight of Umas running in the rain,<n>their hearts
connected with burning<n>emotions and their
sweaty forms<n>splattered with mud...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uwooooah! It's the heaviest of heavy<n>romances,
playing out on the drenched<n>racetrack! My
mouth's watering just<n>thinking about it! ♪
